message: ci: fix windows swift install inputs

files.patch:
@@ -40,8 +40,9 @@ jobs:
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v0.3.0
       with:
-        swift-version: swift-6.2-release
-        swift-build: 6.2-RELEASE
+        branch: swift-6.2-release
+        tag: 6.2-RELEASE
+        build_arch: amd64
 
     - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
@@ -124,8 +125,9 @@ jobs:
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v0.3.0
       with:
-        swift-version: swift-6.2-release
-        swift-build: 6.2-RELEASE
+        branch: swift-6.2-release
+        tag: 6.2-RELEASE
+        build_arch: amd64
 
     - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
       if: runner.os == 'Windows'

@@ -112,8 +112,9 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Swift
         uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v0.3.0
         with:
-          swift-version: swift-6.2-release
-          swift-build: 6.2-RELEASE
+          branch: swift-6.2-release
+          tag: 6.2-RELEASE
+          build_arch: amd64
       - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
         shell: pwsh
         run: |

@@ -147,8 +147,9 @@ jobs:
     - name: Setup Swift
       uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v0.3.0
       with:
-        swift-version: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
-        swift-build: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
+        branch: swift-${{ matrix.swift-version }}-release
+        tag: ${{ matrix.swift-version }}-RELEASE
+        build_arch: amd64
     - name: Ensure Swift CLI available (Windows)
       shell: pwsh
       run: |
